en_title: Kevin Feige Denies the MCU Will Reboot With Secret Wars, Points to 2015 Comic as 'Nice Roadmap' for the Future
cn_title: 凯文·费奇否认《秘密战争》后MCU全面重启
subtitle: 漫画提供路线图

paragraphs.en: Marvel Studios boss Kevin Feige has confirmed that the Marvel Cinematic Universe (MCU) will not get a full reboot after Avengers: Secret Wars ties up Phase Six in 2027 – but he does have a few ideas for where to go next.
paragraphs.cn: 漫威影业负责人凯文·费奇确认，2027年《复仇者联盟：秘密战争》为第六阶段收尾后，漫威电影宇宙不会全面重启，但他已有一些后续构想。

paragraphs.en: The baseball-cap-wearing comic book movie mastermind teased what's next for Marvel's film ambitions during a conversation with Josh Horowitz of Happy, Sad, Confused . There's been some confusion amongst fans when it comes to where films like Avengers: Doomsday and Secret Wars will leave Earth's mightiest heroes upon their premiere, but Feige didn't mince words when asked if next year's team-up film will deliver a reboot.
paragraphs.cn: 这位常戴棒球帽的漫画电影掌舵人在Happy, Sad, Confused节目中与Josh Horowitz交谈，暗示漫威电影的下一步。粉丝一直不清楚《复仇者联盟：毁灭之日》和《秘密战争》上映后英雄们会走向何方；当被问及明年群像电影是否会带来重启时，费奇直截了当。

paragraphs.en: "No," he said, "but I look to the comics, as I always do, in terms of our storytelling. In both the Secret Wars – but particularly the [Jonathan] Hickman Secret Wars from 10 years ago – there's a nice roadmap to where we can go."
paragraphs.cn: 他说：「不会。但在叙事上，我一如既往会参考漫画。两版《秘密战争》都值得看，尤其是10年前Jonathan Hickman创作的版本，其中有一条很好的路线图，告诉我们接下来能去哪里。」

paragraphs.en: Hickman's Secret Wars was published through 2015 and 2016 and tells a multiverse-ending story involving heroes and villains from across the Marvel universe. It also, apparently, will help guide the ever-expanding MCU after its take on Secret Wars debuts next December.
paragraphs.cn: Hickman的《秘密战争》于2015至2016年出版，讲述漫威宇宙众多英雄与反派卷入多元宇宙终结的故事。显然，它也会在MCU版《秘密战争》明年12月上映后，为不断扩张的电影宇宙提供指引。

paragraphs.en: Longtime MCU watchers weren't sure what the event could bring to the live-action movie universe, with a reboot being one idea that's been on the minds of many. Feige has danced around the subject before , saying in 2025 that, while the upcoming X-Men movie will help "reset" the MCU, it won't necessarily be a reboot.
paragraphs.cn: 长期关注MCU的观众不确定这场事件会给真人电影宇宙带来什么，重启是许多人想到的一种可能。费奇此前一直回避这个话题，2025年曾表示，即将推出的X战警电影会帮助「重置」MCU，但未必是重启。

paragraphs.en: "Reboot is a scary word," he told Variety at the time. "Reboot can mean a lot of things to a lot of people. Reset, singular timeline — we’re thinking along those lines. … X-Men is where that will happen next."
paragraphs.cn: 他当时告诉《综艺》：「重启是个吓人的词，对不同人有很多含义。重置、单一时间线——我们正朝这些方向思考……下一次会在X战警这里发生。」

paragraphs.en: Theories of a potential MCU reboot were backed up when, just last month, Doomsday and Secret Wars co-director Joe Russo said this year's Avengers film would put the cinematic universe "back to phase zero."
paragraphs.cn: 上个月，《末日》和《秘密战争》联合导演Joe Russo称，今年的《复仇者联盟》会把电影宇宙「带回第零阶段」，令重启理论得到支持。

paragraphs.en: "Look, we were with Rob [Downey Jr.] earlier today," he told The Hollywood Reporter . "We were both talking about this concept that we are back to phase zero. This is starting over from scratch. We want to make sure everybody feels like this isn’t leaning on anything from the past."
paragraphs.cn: 他告诉《好莱坞报道者》：「今天早些时候我们和小罗伯特·唐尼在一起，都在谈回到第零阶段的概念。这是从零开始。我们想确保所有人都感觉它不依赖过去的任何东西。」

paragraphs.en: Despite promising yet another celebrity-filled clash big enough to crash the multiverse, we know distressingly little about Secret Wars so far. It was only today we got to see a proper Doomsday trailer ahead of its premiere later this year. With Doctor Doom looking to make quite the impact on the MCU, Secret Wars itself is sure to introduce fans to a totally new chapter for the superhero universe.
paragraphs.cn: 尽管承诺又一场足以让多元宇宙崩溃的明星大战，我们对《秘密战争》仍知之甚少。直到今天，观众才在《末日》今年上映前看到正式预告。毁灭博士将对MCU产生巨大影响，《秘密战争》也必会开启超级英雄宇宙的新篇章。

paragraphs.en: Avengers: Secret Wars premieres December 17, 2027. Before its arrival, we can still look forward to next week's Spider-Man: Brand New Day , December 18's Avengers: Doomsday, and more .
paragraphs.cn: 《复仇者联盟：秘密战争》将于2027年12月17日上映。在此之前，还有下周的《蜘蛛侠：崭新之日》、12月18日的《复仇者联盟：毁灭之日》等作品。

paragraphs.en: While we wait for updates, you can read about what a new Doctor Doom poster revealed about this year's team-up movie . You can also see Feige talk about Adam Driver's potential in the MCU , as well as what it's been like to fail to bring Blade to theaters .
paragraphs.cn: 等待新消息期间，你可以阅读毁灭博士新海报透露了哪些今年群像电影的信息，也可了解费奇如何评价Adam Driver加入MCU的可能性，以及他未能让《刀锋战士》登上银幕的感受。

opus_summary: 凯文·费奇明确否认MCU会在2027年《复仇者联盟：秘密战争》后全面重启，称Jonathan Hickman十年前的漫画版为未来提供了路线图，但可能会重置为单一时间线。
